name: Sugar Cane Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the sugar and water to a boil. Remove from heat.
2. Add oils, lemon juice, shallots, garlic, herbs, and seasonings.
3. Marinate shrimp in mixture for at least 1 hour.
4. Using the sugar cane spears, skewer 3 shrimp on each plate; reserve remaining marinade for dressing.
5. Broil or sauté skewers until shrimp is done.
6. Cut tofu into 8 cubes and broil or sauté until golden brown.
7. Place 2 tofu cubes on each plate; top with a shrimp skewer.
8. Garnish with daikon and green onions.
9. Serve with Balsamic Vinaigrette. Makes 4 servings.
BALSAMIC VINAIGRETTE
Combine 1/4 cup balsamic vinegar, 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, 1 teaspoon minced garlic, 1 teaspoon salt, 1/4 teaspoon sugar, and a dash of white pepper. Mix well. Add 1/2 cup of the reserved marinade. Serve over shrimp. Makes 1 cup.
